App.title: Chicken Picks — Football Pools
App.description: The football pool app. Create your pool, invite your friends and win by predicting match results.

Welcome.introLine:
Chicken Picks is for playing the world's
biggest tournaments with your friends
Welcome.step4: You mark who's paid and who hasn't

Scoring.tier1Explanation: You nailed the exact score of the match.
Scoring.tier2Explanation: You got the winner AND the same goal difference, but not the exact score.
Scoring.tier3Explanation: You got the winner of the match, but not the goal difference.
Scoring.tier4Explanation: You got the goals of at least one of the two teams, even if the other was wrong.
Scoring.tier5Explanation: You didn't hit anything: not the winner, not the difference, not either team's goals.
Scoring.expDescTier2: You got the winner and the goal difference matches
Scoring.expDescTier3: You got the winner but the goal difference is different
Scoring.expDescTier4: You guessed at least one team's goals

Soporte.metadataDescription: Help, contact and answers to frequently asked questions.
Soporte.title: Support
Soporte.subtitle: Last updated: May 2026
Soporte.contactBodyBefore: Need help or have a suggestion? Write to us at
Soporte.reportSection: Report a problem from the app
Soporte.reportBody: Inside the app, in the top right, there's a "Report problem" button with an alert icon. Tap it to send us a detailed message and we get notified instantly.
Soporte.q1: How do I join a pool?
Soporte.a1: Ask the organizer for the pool code or invite link. Tap the link, log in with your WhatsApp number and accept the invite.
Soporte.q2: How do I create a new pool?
Soporte.a2: From the home screen, tap the gold button with the "+" symbol. Pick the tournament (Champions, World Cup, La Liga, Premier or Serie A), name the pool, choose the payment mode and you're done. We give you a code and an invite link.
Soporte.a3: Predicting the exact score is worth more points than just predicting the winner. The full scoring guide is in your profile, in the "How scoring works" section.
Soporte.q4: I'm not receiving the SMS verification
Soporte.a4: Make sure the number is written with the country code (e.g. +57 for Colombia). If after a minute nothing arrives, use the "Receive via WhatsApp" option on the login screen.
Soporte.a5: No. It's just a prediction tool between friends. If your pool has a buy-in, that money moves directly between players (outside the app). We don't process payments.
Soporte.q6: How do I delete my account?
Soporte.a6After: with your registered WhatsApp number. We'll delete your account and all associated data within 30 days.
Soporte.privacyBodyBefore: You can read how we handle your data at

DeleteAccount.metadataDescription: How to request deletion of your account and data.
DeleteAccount.title: Delete account
DeleteAccount.subtitle: Last updated: April 2026
DeleteAccount.section1BodyBefore: To delete your account and all associated data, send us an email to
DeleteAccount.section1BodyAfter: and include in the body the phone number you used to log in (international format, e.g. +57 311 234 5678).
DeleteAccount.section1Footer: We'll confirm receipt within 72 hours and complete the deletion within 30 days of the request.
DeleteAccount.section2Intro: We delete the following data associated with your account:
DeleteAccount.section2List3: Your predictions and points in all pools you participated in
DeleteAccount.section2List4: Your participation in pools (we remove you as a member)
DeleteAccount.section2List6: Your login event history and notifications
DeleteAccount.section2List7: Your conversation state with the WhatsApp bot (if you used it)
DeleteAccount.section3Intro: To preserve historical integrity of pools you played in, aggregated stats and past results may be kept
DeleteAccount.section3List2: Pool global settings (buy-in amounts, prizes) — not tied to your identity
DeleteAccount.section3List3: Tournament-level aggregated stats (no individual data, only counts)
DeleteAccount.section3FooterBefore: Your name, number and specific predictions
DeleteAccount.section3FooterAfter: in any identifiable record after 30 days.
DeleteAccount.section4Body: Maximum retention period from the request:
DeleteAccount.section4BodyAfter: . During that period we delete your data from our primary databases and from backups that rotate within the same window.
DeleteAccount.section5BodyBefore: If you have questions about the deletion process, write to us at

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.subtitle: Last updated: April 2026
Privacy.section1Body: We collect the following information when you use the app: your profile name, WhatsApp number, your match predictions and your prediction results (points, standings position). We don't collect location data, contacts, or financial information.
Privacy.section2Body: We use your information to: calculate your prediction points, show standings within each pool, send notifications and results via WhatsApp, and allow other participants of your pool to see your name and score.
Privacy.section3Body: We don't sell or share your data with third parties. The only information visible to other users is your name and score within the pools you participate in. Your WhatsApp number is not visible to other participants.
Privacy.section4BodyBefore: If you want to delete your account and all your data, write to us at
Privacy.section4BodyAfter: and we'll process your request within 30 days.
Privacy.section5BodyBefore: For any questions about this privacy policy, contact us at
